allow: PowerShell($candidates = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter", "$env:USERPROFILE\\fvm", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\flutter", "C:\\src\\flutter", "C:\\flutter", "D:\\flutter", "C:\\tools\\flutter", "$env:USERPROFILE\\dev\\flutter", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents\\flutter", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads\\flutter"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path "$c\\bin\\flutter.bat"\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $c" } }; where.exe dart 2>$null; where.exe flutter 2>$null)
